videos.title: Artifacts & ViVi vs A Corgi
videos.description:
The meta has shaped up to be a tad bit heavier on artifacts and it looks like a bunch of COrgis can help with that!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-artifacts-vivi-vs-a-corgi
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7300244#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/3d8IM
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/dOKzv
